component.name: openQ4 Game Modules
component.summary: Quake 4 game libraries for the openQ4 engine

description.p: openQ4-GameLibs provides the single-player and multiplayer game library modules derived from the Quake 4 SDK, maintained for compatibility with the openQ4 open-source engine replacement.
These modules implement the game logic for Quake 4 and must be used together with the openQ4 engine and original Quake 4 retail assets.
